name: schottky_1d
description: 1D Pt-on-n-Si Schottky diode forward sweep V_F in [0.0, 0.5] V (21 points, 0.025 V step) to validate the M16.5 thermionic-emission Robin BC. Anode is a Schottky contact (type=schottky, barrier_height_eV=0.85 per Sze 3rd ed Table 5); cathode is ohmic. Uniform N_D = 1e16 cm^-3 over a 5 um device (moderate doping where the depletion region is short and thermionic emission dominates over diffusion). Boltzmann statistics; Fermi-Dirac generalization is a follow-up. The companion verifier (scripts/run_benchmark.py verify_schottky_1d) compares this run to the closed-form thermionic-emission I-V J = A* T^2 exp(-q phi_B / kT) [exp(qV/kT) - 1] and asserts < 10 % relative error from V_F = 0.1 V to 0.5 V; the V_F = 0.0 V endpoint is excluded because the relative error blows up at zero current.
